chapter_title.en: Chapter 26 – The Penalty (Hadd) of the slanderer

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ لَوْ أُتِيتُ بِرَجُلٍ قَدْ قَذَفَ عَبْداً مُسْلِماً بِالزِّنَى لَا نَعْلَمُ مِنْهُ إِلَّا خَيْراً لَضَرَبْتُهُ الْحَدَّ حَدَّ الْحُرِّ إِلَّا سَوْطاً .

en.hubeali: Ibn Mahboub, from Abdul Aziz, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘If they come up to measws with a man who slandered a Muslim servant with the adultery, not being known from him except for the goodness, Iasws would strike him with the Penalty (Hadd), a Penalty (Hadd) of the free (man) except for one lash (less)’.
